topText: This 2003 Ford F-250 is screaming across Vatnajokull Glacier at over 75mph. With massive custom flares and a tire inflation system, it is built to glide over the Icelandic deep freeze.
bottomText: "Making every 6.0 owner on earth proud." Most are afraid to drive these to the grocery, but this man is out here proving what a built Ford can actually handle.
